message:
fix(fcp-protocol): update FCPC tests for SessionDirection API + session cookie improvements

- Add SessionDirection parameter to all FcpcFrame::seal and open calls in golden vectors tests
- Fix session_mac_rejects_wrong_direction test to use different directions for compute vs verify
- Add pretty_assertions to workspace dependencies for fcp-conformance
- Include suites and transport_limits in session cookie computation
- Update FCPC benchmarks for new seal/open API
- Update fuzz targets for SessionDirection

Related: flywheel_connectors-1n78.13 (FCPC Wire Protocol)
Related: flywheel_connectors-1n78.21.1 (Golden Vectors)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
